title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Raizo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Finger Page Request: Everything nice extinguishing smoker after assuming the smoke coming from his cigar was caused by a fire." Pew name: the way of Nakahara

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: Master Solitaire!! The Keys were stolen!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Somebody took the keys to the seasons handcuffs!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell have you lot been doing!!!? Didn't any of you see the culprit!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was... a man with a car- Crabtuan face!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Grrr > Rrrrhhhhhh!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He left a fake set of keys in the safe... I was out- grabbed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He took advantage of the fact that I can only walk sideways...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOU BASTARD!!! YOU'RE UNFIT TO BE A GUARD!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He must still be some- where in the tower!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tear every inch of it apart!! Even the attic!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Nin-Nin... win-win...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: NIN- NOJREEN!!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: THIS IS A NINJAS TRUE STRENETH!!

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: I stole the keys!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold on just a little longer, LuffTaro!! The time to escape this prison has come!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It took a while, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that's left is for us to make a stealthful escape!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The #1 Rule in Wano Country's Prisoner mine is as follows:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "If you talk back to a guard, you will be punished."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The punish-ment for the first offence: Dismememberment of both of your arms.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The punish-ment for the second offence: Dismememberment of both of your legs.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the punishment for the third offence: execution!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 23 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
